name: Yomi
description: __Height:__ 160 cm A calm and somewhat slow girl, who however, has also a darker side. She's also obsessed with bean sprouts and puts them in almost everything she cooks. Her obsession stems from her youth, as her parents died in poverty, and she considers bean sprouts to be good food for the poor to live on. She fights with a huge claymore-like sword.

name: Youmei
description: [Kujirai Reiko's](https://anilist.co/character/160725/Reiko-Kujirai) friend. She recently moved to Kowloon and works sewing stuffed animals. She has a bright personality and a mysterious past.

name: Yu-Ra
description: __Country:__ South Korea Yu-Ra, known as the 'Blood Witch' and the 8th Servant of God Yatan, is a high ranked and powerful User. Yu-Ra is a player best known for her beauty and support for the Yatan Church. She is a famous person who frequently appears on TV because of her beautiful appearance and outstanding abilities. Contrary to her creepy nickname of the ‘Blood Witch’, she was well loved and respected, as well as a target of envy. Thanks to her superb beauty, perfect gaming skills and ideal

name: Yui Nagomi
description: **Height:** 155 cm (165 cm as Cure Precious) Yui is a relaxed, straightforward, and energetic 2nd year middle school student. Her family owns a diner, and she is an only child. She has outstanding physical drive and gets hungry quickly. Her catchphrases are "Delicious smile~!" and "I'm hungry~!" She loves fresh vegetables. Yui cherishes her grandmother's motto, "food are smiles". With [Kome-Kome](https://anilist.co/character/260903/KomeKome)'s power, she can transform into Cure Precious.

name: Yuki
description: A cool beauty who monitors the other vampires on behalf of an entity known as ["Mother."](https://anilist.co/character/343294/Mother) Part of her responsibilities are providing the vampires with their blood supply.

description: __Height:__ 140 cm (4'7") Yutaka, a very positive and cheerful but sometimes forgetful girl, is Konata's cousin and Yui's younger sister. Also referred to as "Yu-chan" by Konata and Sōjirō. When Konata became a third year student, she was admitted to Ryōō Gakuen High School as a first year student. She is in the same class, 1-D, as Minami and ran for candidacy for class president on the first day of school. name: Agnes Digital
description: **Height:** 143cm I love Umamusume! A super versatile otaku. A veritable Umamusume otaku. She came to Tracen Academy to be close to all of her favorite runners. She does respect boundaries, however, and tries to stay out of trouble. She's eager to get up close and personal with as many Umamusume as possible, and to that end she has revealed surprising ability on both dirt and turf.

name: Aina Sahalin
description: Aina is a Zeon test pilot. She test new mobile suit designed by her older brother, Ginias Sahalin, and sees their faults. She loves to help people and she is rarely violent. She doesn't want to kill anyone and wants the war to end soon. She falls in love with Shiro after a fateful encounter in space.

description: A beautiful girl who has returned to the countryside with careful plans to be united with her crush Hajime. She excels academically, but is not good at sports. Super clumsy and spineless.

name: Aoi Tokujira
description: Often called the Thorn Princess of the Library by her schoolmates, she's known for harshly rejecting every boy who confesses to her. She loves reading books, and often resides in a quiet, solitary spot in the school library. Aoi Tokujira was named the "Thorn Princess" for her tendency to hurt any guy who approaches her. It's later revealed that she has a fear of men, and that her best friend is a girl named Botan.

name: Badou Nails
description: Badou Nails is a chain smoking, freelance journalist and photographer. Badou has long red hair and wears an eye-patch. Seven years ago, he was attacked by Richter Berthein, losing his right eye. His mood directly corresponds to the availability of cigarettes and the level of nicotine in his blood. He can swing from extreme elation to murderous violence. He had an older brother named Dave, whom he believes is dead. name: Code
description: He is an inner member of Kara. Code appears to have a mocking and arrogant demeanor. ~!Code was among those Jigen and Amado experimented on in order to find a suitable vessel for [Isshiki Ootsutsuki](https://anilist.co/character/189948). Code proved to be an unsuitable receptacle for Isshiki's soul but survived the ordeal, attaining a White Karma. Code came to worship Isshiki as a god and was inducted into Kara as an Inner, with Amado enhancing his body with Scientific Ninja Tools.!~

name: Dahlia Rosetti
description: After dying of overwork in Japan, Dahlia is reborn into a world filled with magic. Raised by a master of magical toolmaking, Dahlia immerses herself in the art of crafting magical items and develops a passion for the craft. She becomes engaged to her father's apprentice, but before her father can see her wed, he suddenly passes away. As if this weren’t enough, on the day before their wedding, her fiancé announces that he’s in love—but not with her!
mediaTitles: Dahlia in Bloom: Crafting a Fresh Start with Magical Tools

name: Dali Delico
description: __Height:__ 175 cm Head of a noble vampire family, who is raising two children. He has a haughty and sadistic disposition, but acts the opposite toward his children due to a promise toward his late wife.

name: E
description: E is the Head of the logistical support group Pleasure and leader of the mining group. She was the first goblin to ask [Rou](https://anilist.co/character/133061/Rou) to train them. She was also placed 4th in the very first hierarchy tournament.

name: Eriko Ichimura
description: A plain-looking high school girl who spends her free time posting fantasies of handsome men on her Twitter. Goes by "Lovesick Ellie" as her handle.
